case_title: BRANDT ROBERTS ET AL VS. NANCY MORROW

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $61.00 SERVED NOV-05-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MORROW, NANCY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-18-2015 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROBERTS, BRANDT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,591.05 FILED BY ROBERTS, BRANDT ROBERTS, MOIRA AS TO DEFENDANT MORROW, NANCY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-06-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-18-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-18-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT EXCEPT PLAINTIFF MOIRA ROBERTS WHO WAS NOT PRESENT AT TODAYS HEARING. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY RUSSIAN INTERPRETER---YULIYA TANOV. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROBERTS, BRANDT ROBERTS, MOIRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORROW, NANCY $246.00 PRINCIPAL, $136.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $382.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-18-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-06-2015 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
